text_original: If any one should wish to get the kingdom for himself, and to effect this by what he does, I see that he will not succeed.
text_normalized: If any one should wish to get the kingdom for himself, and to effect this by what he does, I see that he will not succeed.

text_original: The kingdom is a spirit-like thing, and cannot be got by active doing.
text_normalized: The kingdom is a spirit-like thing, and cannot be got by active doing.

text_original: He who would so win it destroys it;
text_normalized: He who would so win it destroys it;

text_original: he who would hold it in his grasp loses it.
text_normalized: he who would hold it in his grasp loses it.

text_original: The course and nature of things is such that
text_normalized: The course and nature of things is such that

text_original: What was in front is now behind;
text_normalized: What was in front is now behind;

text_original: What warmed anon we freezing find.
text_normalized: What warmed anon we freezing find.

text_original: Strength is of weakness oft the spoil;
text_normalized: Strength is of weakness oft the spoil;

text_original: The store in ruins mocks our toil.
text_normalized: The store in ruins mocks our toil.

text_original: Hence the sage puts away excessive effort, extravagance, and easy indulgence.
text_normalized: Hence the sage puts away excessive effort, extravagance, and easy indulgence.
